passives.name: Skipper
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] against any enemy grant a stack for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. At '''maximum''' stacks, or 4 stacks, your next basic attack against a champion, epic monster, or structure consumes all stacks to deal {{as|{{rd|120%|{{ap|120*0.7}}%}} '''base''' AD|ad}} {{as|(+ {{rd|5%|{{ap|5*0.7}}%}} '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, increased to {{as|{{rd|300%|{{ap|300*0.7}}%}} '''base''' AD|ad}} {{as|(+ {{rd|10%|{{ap|10*0.7}}%}} '''maximum''' health)}} against structures.

passives.name: Boarding Party
passives.effects: Allied {{ui|Blue Siege Minion|link=Siege minion|siege minions}} and {{ui|Blue Super Minion|link=Super minion|super minions}} within {{tip|er|icononly=true}} {{tt|1050|Estimated}} units gain {{rd|70 to 130 for 11|70*0.5 to 130*0.5 for 11|levels=1;9 to 18|pp=true}} {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}}, as well as 10% increased size.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] against any enemy grant a stack for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times

At '''maximum''' stacks, or 4 stacks, your next basic attack against a champion, epic monster, or structure consumes all stacks to deal {{as {{rd 120% {{ap 120*0.7}}%}} '''base''' AD ad}} {{as (+ {{rd 5% {{ap 5*0.7}}%}} '''maximum''' health)}} {{as '''bonus''' physical damage}}, increased to {{as {{rd 300% {{ap 300*0.7}}%}} '''base''' AD ad}} {{as (+ {{rd 10% {{ap 10*0.7}}%}} '''maximum''' health)}} against structures.

Allied {{ui Blue Siege Minion link=Siege minion siege minions}} and {{ui Blue Super Minion link=Super minion super minions}} within {{tip er icononly=true}} {{tt 1050 Estimated}} units gain {{rd 70 to 130 for 11 70*0.5 to 130*0.5 for 11 levels=1;9 to 18 pp=true}} {{as '''bonus''' armor}} and {{as '''bonus''' magic resistance}}, as well as 10% increased size.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Hullbreaker is modeled as split-push pressure: repeated combat hits prime an empowered objective/champion strike while nearby siege and super minions gain defensive aura bonuses.
Minion aura range noted as estimated in source text.
